productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Racing Big Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionAqua blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbing around neckline and graphic on the frontFittingSlimWash care Hand wash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Embrace the elements and indulge the bad boy in you with this aqua blue tee from wrangler. The graphic on the front with the distressed look graphic is inspired by motorcycle races and is infused with the spirit of advenutre. Team this  with jeans and a black motorcycle jacket for an outing alone or with friends. Add on a pair of stylish footwear from the wide international range available at myntra and stay cool and comfortable through all seasons in this pure cotton tee.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
